refined_caption: The hospital bathroom has two sinks and appears to be dirty and unhygienic. The state of the bathroom suggests a lack of proper cleaning and maintenance.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the condition of the hospital bathroom, it was dirty and unhygienic. The sinks were not clean and the overall state of the bathroom was unacceptable. As a patient, I expect a clean and safe environment, especially in a hospital.
voice_text: The hospital bathroom is really dirty and gross, it's not clean at all. I'm worried about getting sick from using it.
